'''Rycar's Run''' was one of most treacherous space routes used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. It involved at least eight [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jumps. This one in particular was made infamous by [[Rycar Ryjerd/Legends|Rycar Ryjerd]], who was considered to be an idiot for doing so.<ref name="SaV" />

==Description==
While the [[Kessel Run/Legends|Kessel Run]] was considered dangerous, Rycar's Run was outright insane. It began with picking up [[Verpine shatter gun]]s at the [[Roche asteroid field]], continued with slipping out while avoiding Imperial patrols, and arriving at [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where guns were exchanged for slaves from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The slaves were then transferred to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], where they were exchanged for a load of [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. On the prison [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] the spice was exchanged for a freedom of certain convicts, who were then transported to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to resume their criminal career.<ref name="SaV" />
